visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young man with black hair, wearing a black puffer vest over a black turtleneck, stands on a paved urban sidewalk at night. He looks directly at the camera with a neutral but attentive expression. The background features blurred city lights, shop signs with Chinese characters, and a quiet street environment. (2) The man leans closer to the camera, smiling broadly and gesturing with his hands as he speaks. Inset graphics of Taiwanese breakfast items (soy milk and fried dough sticks) appear briefly on the left. The lighting is dominated by artificial street lamps and shop glows. (3) He stands upright again, holding a small white plastic bag in his left hand. He pauses, looking thoughtful for a second, then smiles and brings both hands together in a prayer-like or grateful gesture near his chest. (4) A second man, wearing a blue puffer jacket, enters from the right. He smiles at the camera and mimics the prayer-like hand gesture, appearing to give instructions or demonstrating a specific mannerism. A small lavalier microphone is visible on his jacket collar. (5) Both men are now in the frame, standing side-by-side. They are smiling widely, moving their heads rhythmically, and repeatedly performing the hand gesture while looking at the camera in a friendly, high-energy manner.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Variety]: POV 剛學台語的韓國歐巴🇰🇷. [Slogan]: 你說說剛學到的🇹🇼台語吧！. [Subtitle]: 배우 대만 방언 말해주세요. (2) [Slogan]: 我可是有學到一句！. [Variety]: 豆漿?... 原來是「多謝」😍. [Subtitle]: 하나 배웠습니다. (3) [Slogan]: 還有！. [Variety]: ?????? 感恩 !. [Subtitle]: 이랑... (4) [Slogan]: 不不 感恩要這種氣氣. [Variety]: (不確定有什麼差異😂). [Subtitle]: 이게 감은 살짝 이런 느낌으로. (5) [Variety]: 多謝 多謝 多謝. [Slogan]: 如果在台北看到韓國男人講多謝的話就是他們兩個囉^^...

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 2 main male creators interacting with the camera.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: Two young Asian men; one in a black puffer vest and black turtleneck, the other in a blue puffer jacket.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A typical urban street in Taiwan at night with shop signs in Chinese, parked scooters, and soft artificial lighting.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A female voice asks a question in Korean with a polite, inquiring tone. Upbeat, high-tempo electronic pop music fades in. Background ambient noise is a faint urban hum. (2) A male voice responds in Korean with a cheerful, energetic tone. He then says 'Do-sia' with a clear, sharp rising intonation, followed by a 'Ding' sound effect. The BGM beat is prominent. (3) The same male voice says 'and' in Korean, pauses briefly, then articulates 'Gam-un' with high pitch and strong volume. A 'Pop' sound effect triggers immediately after. (4) A second male voice with a slightly deeper, warmer timbre enters, speaking Korean and laughing lightly. He explains the 'feeling' of the word with a gentle, explanatory cadence. (5) Both male voices join together, chanting 'Do-sia' in a fast, rhythmic, and high-pitched manner several times. The voices overlap with the energetic BGM and conclude with shared laughter and a final upbeat musical flourish.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Interaction 1 -> Interaction 2 -> Demonstration -> Outro
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To entertain by showing Korean men attempting to speak Taiwanese Hokkien in a humorous and charming way, highlighting cultural interaction and the 'cuteness' of their linguistic efforts.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses typical social media editing styles with variety-show captions and sound effects to enhance the comedic effect of the language learning challenge.
